name: intent queue non roll then roll

source.purpose: A harmless first intent stays roll-free while the queued technical intent retains its required roll gate.

input.playerInput: Nod to the clerk, then hack the sealed terminal for the departure logs.

userMessageContainsAll: ### Private ordered intent queue (mandatory, never mention)
Current intent: Nod to the clerk
Remaining intents after current: hack the sealed terminal for the departure logs
2. [REMAINING] hack the sealed terminal for the departure logs — actionType=investigate; targetEntityIds=(unresolved); requiredRollGate=technical_system via Investigation/Arcana
